IHU Teacher Training Center is Officially Validated to Run the Trinity CertTESOL Course

03.06.2022

IHU Teacher Training Center as a division of School of Languages provides high-quality teacher training programs.

After the completion of a number of successful training courses such as TEFL, TESOL and rounds of scrutiny by Trinity College London (one of the most reputable centers for providing internationally recognized teacher training courses), the center is now officially validated to run the Trinity CertTESOL course.

Center is now one of the 3 official centers offering the Trinity CertTESOL in Turkey.

Detailed information:

https://sl.ihu.edu.tr/en/trinity-certtesol
